Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Hidden Compass
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +15% (augmented)
Pack Size: +16% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +44% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +85% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 82
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 230(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +24(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 25(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Prefix Modifier "Profane" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 15(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Chaos
{ Prefix Modifier "Venomous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 28(27-33)% chance to Poison on Hit
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
16(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Infernal" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Fire
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
